en.text: Fixed Normal-target emissive: seam, Diffuse/Normal mutex, real-time drag
Fixed game not refreshing on decal delete and stale canvas bake
Removed 'highlight layer' button

zh.text: 修复 Normal 贴图发光的接缝、Diffuse/Normal 互斥与拖动实时性
修复删除贴花后游戏端不刷新和画布残留烘焙
移除「高亮显示图层」按钮

en.text: Added undo / redo
Added performance monitor
Fixed memory leak

zh.text: 添加了撤销和重做功能
添加性能监控
修复内存泄漏问题

en.text: Polished the UI

zh.text: 优化了界面

en.text: Fixed body gloss / sheen / oily-skin rendering when emissive is enabled

zh.text: 修复开启发光时身体油光 / 光泽 / 油皮的显示问题

en.text: Reworked the preview texture decoding pipeline to support BC7

zh.text: 重做预览纹理解码管线，支持 BC7

en.text: Cross-project decal library: content-hash dedup, 96px thumbnail grid, right-click delete (idea from @Glorou via TextureOverlayer)
File picker auto-imports into the library -- projects stay valid even when source PNGs are moved or renamed
Normal map alpha can now drive emissive: auto-detected on import, preview and export share the same pipeline with GPU animation support
Normal-only emissive no longer causes full-body flicker in preview -- preview now routes through the patched skin shader like export does
Adding a decal to skin.shpk variants (skin_ct, etc.) no longer makes the material card vanish
DDS loader now handles BC7 / BC1-5 and DX10 extended headers

zh.text: 新增跨项目贴花素材库：内容哈希去重，96px 缩略图网格，右键删除 (思路来自 @Glorou 的 TextureOverlayer)
选图对话框自动入库，源图被移动或改名后项目依然可用
Normal 贴图 alpha 可作为发光遮罩：导入时自动识别，预览与导出走同一管线且支持 GPU 动画
Normal-only 发光在预览中不再导致全身闪烁 ---- 预览与导出统一走 patched skin 着色器
对 skin.shpk 变体 (skin_ct 等) 添加贴花后，材质卡片不再消失
DDS 加载器支持 BC7 / BC1-5 与 DX10 扩展头

en.text: Copy / paste decal group actions (thanks @endfish, #1)
Decal rotate (CCW/CW 90deg) and mirror (X/Y) tools (thanks @endfish, #2)
Pasting decal groups across materials with different texture aspect ratios no longer stretches decals

zh.text: 新增贴花组复制 / 粘贴 (感谢 @endfish, #1)
新增贴花旋转 (逆/顺 90deg) 与镜像 (水平/垂直) 工具 (感谢 @endfish, #2)
跨不同宽高比材质粘贴贴花组时不再拉伸

en.text: Normal target decals no longer leave trails when dragged
UV wireframe shows the full mesh right after plugin reload -- no need to reopen the 3D editor
Path diagnostics opens in a resizable standalone window
Added Full Redraw toolbar button to recover when previews get stuck
Support for body mods with non-standard texture names (Bibo+ etc.)
Skin body materials no longer show the Mask option since it has no effect there
Changelog tab and multi-select copy in the debug log

zh.text: Normal 目标贴花拖动时不再有残影
插件重载后 UV 网格立即完整显示，无需重新打开 3D 编辑器
路径诊断改为独立可调整大小的窗口
工具栏新增完全重绘按钮，预览卡住时一键恢复
支持非标命名的身体 mod (Bibo+ 等)
skin 身体材质不再显示 Mask 选项 (该材质上没效果)
新增更新日志 Tab 和调试日志多选复制

en.text: Per-layer target map: decals can independently paint Diffuse, Mask, or Normal textures
Normal / Mask layers preserve normal.alpha so the emissive and ColorTable row-index systems still work
Auto-detect normal maps on image load: filename hint (_n / _norm / normal) or blue-dominant RGB
Non-Diffuse target layers hide the Show Decal / Emissive / PBR controls for a cleaner parameter panel

zh.text: 按图层选择目标贴图：贴花可独立画到 Diffuse / Mask / Normal 三张贴图
Normal / Mask 图层不写 normal.alpha，保留给发光与 ColorTable 行号系统
加载图片时自动识别法线贴图：文件名含 _n / _norm / normal，或 RGB 蓝色主导即命中
非 Diffuse 目标下自动隐藏显示贴花/发光/PBR 选项，参数面板更简洁

en.text: Emissive ripple animation with directional modes and dual-color support
Emissive gradient animation: smooth transition between two colors
Iris pulse animation with per-frame CBuffer modulation, flicker animation, fix for hidden layers breaking in-place swap

zh.text: 发光水波纹动画，支持方向模式与双色
发光双色渐变动画：在两种颜色之间平滑过渡
虹膜脉冲实时调制、闪烁动画，修复隐藏图层导致 in-place 失效

en.text: Per-layer emissive pulse animation with independent parameters
Cross-group visibility toggle + emissive layer feathering preserved across redraws
Iris mask compositing: patched emissive mask for vanilla eyes missing red-channel glow source

zh.text: 贴花发光脉冲动画，每层参数独立
跨组可见性切换，羽化+发光贴花状态在重绘间保留
虹膜 mask 合成：为红通道为空的原版眼睛自动生成发光遮罩

en.text: Initial release: real-time decal compositing on FFXIV skin textures via Penumbra temporary mods
UV canvas editor + 3D model preview with ray-picking decal placement
Per-layer blend modes, clip modes, UV transform, falloff masks
.pmp mod export for sharing with other users

zh.text: 首个版本：通过 Penumbra 临时 mod 在 FFXIV 皮肤贴图上实时合成贴花
UV 画布编辑器 + 3D 模型预览，支持射线点击放置贴花
按图层设置混合模式、裁剪、UV 变换、羽化遮罩
.pmp mod 导出，可分享给其他玩家
